name: family-holiday-finder
description: Find and rank 15 verified family package holidays across selected Czech and Slovak travel operators.

interface.longDescription: Searches Blue Style, EXIM tours, TUI, Cedok, and optionally Hydrotour, then verifies rooms, flights, board, ratings, and prices before ranking 15 family holiday options.
defaultPrompt: Find 15 family holidays matching my dates and constraints.
